notes: Reborn-added (not in APW). Overrides 14 CONT records the OOO Updated (Unofficial Patch) sets to nonexistent harvest\containers\XMSharvest*HiFi.nif paths and resets each to vanilla MODL (Clutter\LowerClass\LowerCoveredPot01.NIF, Furniture\UpperClass\UpperDesk01.NIF, Furniture\UpperClass\UpperCubboard02.NIF, Clutter\UpperClass\UpperExecDesk01.NIF). Mirrors APW Conflict Resolution.esp's behavior. Loads after OOO_Unoficial-Patch.esp so its overrides win in BP merge.

Reborn-added central config-overrides mod (mirrors APW's "A Painted World Configs" pattern). Holds Reborn-specific INI/setting tweaks for upstream mods. MUST load late (high priority / bottom of MO2 left pane) to win file conflicts. Contents: (1) OBSE/Plugins/oblivion_display_tweaks.ini — bBorderless=1 (borderless windowed); (2) menus/prefabs/dsEnemyHealth/Vanilla/Main.xml — container <y> 30 -> 40 (Better Enemy Health bar dropped 10px to clear the reticle area). Add new tweaks here rather than editing upstream mod archives.
Reborn-added (not in APW). Phase OOO 2026-04-30: SB_WeaponDropFix_OOOFilterPatch.esp relocated from optional/ to mod root and enabled (was previously parked).

Phase 1.5 alternate start (active): in-game menu offers Skip Intro / Vanilla / Random Start. Required because skipping prison via console (coc weye) leaves UL/MOO in partially-initialized state. v1.2 by Mixxa77.

Phase 1 leveling system. v1.9.5.2. Defaults + rested_mode=2 (XP-based rested bonus, prevents AFK leveling) override in Reborn Configs/Ultimate Leveling for advanced users.ini. Pairs natively with MOO via Maskar same-author auto-detection.
